summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Y-Store V2-19 Wishlist and Compare features. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% local success rate), frontend loading and UI components functional. Public URL routing issue identified.

critical_bugs.issue: Public URL https://smart-payment-core.preview.emergentagent.com returns 404 for all API endpoints
critical_bugs.impact: Frontend cannot connect to backend via public URL, only localhost works

integration_issues.issue: Frontend configured to use public URL that returns 404 errors

passed_tests: Frontend CompareBar Component (hidden when no items - correct behavior)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix public URL routing. Backend APIs work perfectly on localhost:8001 but public URL https://smart-payment-core.preview.emergentagent.com returns 404 for all endpoints. This prevents frontend-backend integration. All V2-19 Wishlist and Compare APIs are implemented and functional locally.
